title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 17 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 17 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 17 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends,the main contract closed 538.5, an decrease of 1.01 % throughout the day. the quotation in themorning was decreased by 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak;steel mills purchased on demand, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 600 yuan/ mt; the same as Tangshan,.
